jsonLd.title: Entry-Level SEO Specialist at FurnitureMart
jsonLd.description:
Join the FurnitureMart family as a SEO Specialist in Hyderabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About FurnitureMart:
FurnitureMart is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Develop and implement category growth strategies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FurnitureMart!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
